name: glm-ocr-cli
description: Local OCR CLI and Pi skill for PDFs and images on Apple Silicon using GLM-OCR.

scripts.check: bash -n install.sh bin/ocr completions/ocr.bash skills/ocr/scripts/*.sh && (command -v zsh >/dev/null 2>&1 && zsh -n completions/_ocr || true) && node scripts/validate-layout.mjs
